creator: peter@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 159081
update to syncthing 0.11.16

We use syncthing, syncthing-cli and syncthing-inotify in the freebsd.org cluster.  I've updated the port locally to include a fix for a directory update race and am attaching the the changes I made.

There are two ports updated: net/syncthing and net/syncthing-cli.   The syncthing-cli update includes some minor bug fixes, but it uses shared source with the net/syncthing port and should be updated as well.

Aside from the bugs fixed upstream, the update is trivial.
